repo.description: text detection mainly based on ctpn model in tensorflow, id card detect, connectionist text proposal network

terms.context_snippet: text detection mainly based on ctpn (connectionist text proposal network). It is implemented in tensorflow. I use id card detect as an example to demonstrate the results, but it should be noticing that this model can be used in almost every horizontal scene text detection task. …
